summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of EVO (Elternvereinigung Oberglatt) homepage design prototype. All sections render correctly with proper responsive design and interactive elements working as expected.
passed_tests: Hero section displays correctly with family image, headline, and two CTA buttons
Mission/Wofür wir stehen section shows 3 value cards with icons
Events section displays 3 event cards with dates, images, and anmelden links
Robihütte section shows cabin image with features list and CTA
Team section displays 3 board members with photos, names, roles
Mitmachen CTA band with 3 action buttons
Newsletter section with email input and subscribe button working
Footer with contact info, links, and social icons
Header navigation works including mobile hamburger menu
Responsive design works on mobile and tablet viewports
All interactive elements (buttons, links, forms) are clickable and functional
Color scheme and design elements display properly
Mobile navigation menu opens and closes correctly
Newsletter form accepts input and submits successfully
